title: Import existing workspace artifacts into TASKS.json
description: Refine the detector-produced draft of goals, tasks, and milestones with the user, then emit YAML fences for the merge step.
spec:
```yaml
goals:
  - id: "goal-typescript-minus-typescript"
    title: "TypeScript Minus TypeScript"
    rationale: "**Status:** Early development"
  - id: "goal-typescript-syntax-in-js-files---write-let-x-number-5-and-it"
    title: "✨ **TypeScript syntax in `.js` files** - Write `let x: number = 5` and it becomes JSDoc"
  - id: "goal-live-conversion---see-your-changes-reflected-in-real-time-wi"
    title: "🔄 **Live conversion** - See your changes reflected in real-time (with smart debouncing)"
  - id: "goal-smart-comment-handling---preserves-your-meaningful-comments"
    title: "💬 **Smart comment handling** - Preserves your meaningful comments, converts type-only annotations"
  - id: "goal-auto-generate-d-ts-files---optionally-generate-declaration-f"
    title: "📝 **Auto-generate `.d.ts` files** - Optionally generate declaration files on save (off by default)"
  - id: "goal-respects-your-formatting---maintains-your-indentation-and-co"
    title: "🎨 **Respects your formatting** - Maintains your indentation and code style"
```

```yaml
milestones:
  - title: "Run pnpm install"
    evidence: "- [x] Run pnpm install"
```
